title: Embedded Agentic Retrieval (EAR): evaluation dataset and harness
description:
Per-question evaluation records and the reproducible evaluation harness for the study Embedded Agentic Retrieval (EAR): Answer-Quality Parity With Multi-Call Agentic RAG at a Single Generator Call.

data/ contains the per-question records (six pipelines across four corpora; a cross-family GPT-4o-mini judge run; a cross-family GPT-4o-mini generation run; ablations; a combined-index multi-document experiment; retriever precision) and, new in v1.1.0, data/gnu_second_domain/ — a second-domain generalization study on GNU technical documentation (bash/coreutils/make, 135 hand-authored questions). ear_eval/ contains the Python harness that produced them.

Licensing: the data (data/) is licensed CC BY 4.0 and the code (ear_eval/) MIT. Exception: short verbatim manual excerpts embedded in data/gnu_second_domain/*_checkpoint.jsonl remain under the GNU Free Documentation License v1.3 (© FSF); the manuals themselves are not redistributed. See data/gnu_second_domain/NOTICE.md. This record's license field reflects the primary data license.
